# WebDataRocks Pivot Table

[![WebDataRocks](https://cdn.webdatarocks.com/readmes/main.png)](https://www.webdatarocks.com/?r=rm_wdr)
Website: [webdatarocks.com](https://www.webdatarocks.com?r=rm_wdr)

[![NPM](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/@webdatarocks/webdatarocks)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@webdatarocks/webdatarocks)
[![Github Stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/webdatarocks?style=social)](https://github.com/webdatarocks) [![Twitter](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/WebDataRocks?style=social)](https://twitter.com/WebDataRocks)

WebDataRocks is a free JavaScript pivot grid component for web data visualization and analysis.

This enterprise-featured tool easily creates interactive reports of your business data. With WebDataRocks, you get real-time reporting on any device you prefer (PC, tablet, mobile, etc.).

## Installation and usage

Refer to the following guide for details on how to embed WebDataRocks in your project: [Integrating WebDataRocks](https://www.webdatarocks.com/doc/js/how-to-start-online-reporting/?r=rm_wdr).

## Supported data formats

WebDataRocks supports data in CSV and JSON formats. Data size should be up to 1MB.

## Pivoting features

- Filtering
- Sorting
- Grouping fields in rows and columns
- Drill-down
- Drill-through
- Different aggregations
- Calculated fields
- Number formatting
- Conditional formatting

## Additional options

- Integration with frameworks ([Angular](https://www.webdatarocks.com/doc/angular/how-to-start-online-reporting/?r=rm_wdr), [React](https://www.webdatarocks.com/doc/react/how-to-start-online-reporting/?r=rm_wdr), [Vue](https://www.webdatarocks.com/doc/vue/how-to-start-online-reporting/?r=rm_wdr), and [other technologies](https://www.webdatarocks.com/doc/js/available-tutorials/?r=rm_wdr)).
- Integration with 3rd party charting libraries (Highcharts, amCharts, and others).
- Localization to any language.
- Custom CSS themes.
- Handy Toolbar that gives access to the most popular pivoting features.
